message:
feat(buffer,cell): enhance buffer scrolling, history, and cell comparison

Significantly expand buffer and cell modules with production-ready features
for efficient terminal rendering and text manipulation.

Buffer improvements (src/buffer/mod.rs):
- ScrollRegion struct for defining scrollable viewport regions
- Scroll methods: scroll_up/down with configurable region bounds
- Buffer history with configurable max_history for undo/redo
- save_to_history() and restore_from_history() for state management
- BufferDiff computation for incremental rendering
- Efficient cell comparison to minimize terminal writes
- Viewport clipping and bounds checking
- ANSI escape sequence parsing integration

Cell improvements (src/cell.rs):
- Comprehensive PartialEq implementation for efficient diff computation
- Cell comparison considers content, style, fg/bg colors, and attributes
- Wide character and grapheme cluster handling
- CellContent enum: Char, Wide(char, width), Grapheme(GraphemeId), Continuation, Empty
- is_empty(), is_continuation(), display_width() accessors
- Style merging with blend() for layered styling
- Memory-efficient representation using Rgba colors

New tests (tests/cell_tests.rs):
- 25+ unit tests covering cell creation, comparison, wide chars, graphemes
- Style application and blending tests
- Content operation tests for all CellContent variants
- Comprehensive coverage for cell module public API

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
